sentences.target: Ich brauche einen Tipp für das Rezept.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nən tɪp fyːɐ̯ das ʁeˈt͡sɛpt./

translations.de: Ich brauche einen Tipp für das Rezept.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nən tɪp fyːɐ̯ das ʁeˈt͡sɛpt./
translations.en: I need a tip for the recipe.
translations.es: Necesito un consejo para la receta.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’un conseil pour la recette.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un consiglio per la ricetta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要一个做这道菜的小窍门。
translations.yue: 我需要一個關於個食譜嘅貼士。
translations.pt: Preciso de uma dica para a receita.
translations.tr: Tarif için bir ipucuya ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần một mẹo cho công thức.
translations.nl: Ik heb een tip nodig voor het recept.
translations.hu: Szükségem van egy tippre a recepthez.
translations.hi: मुझे इस रेसिपी के लिए एक सलाह चाहिए।
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι μια συμβουλή για τη συνταγή.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger et tips til oppskriften.
translations.sv: Jag behöver ett tips till receptet.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de un sfat pentru rețetă.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for et tip til opskriften.
translations.ja: このレシピのコツがほしい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); predicates the need.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Tipp'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a PP indicating purpose.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Rezept' after 'für'.
Common noun, neuter; complement of the preposition 'für' (accusative).

sentences.target: Mein Bruder gibt mir einen Tipp fürs Spiel.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ɡɪpt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən tɪp fyːʁs ʃpiːl./

translations.de: Mein Bruder gibt mir einen Tipp fürs Spiel.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ɡɪpt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən tɪp fyːʁs ʃpiːl./
translations.en: My brother gives me a tip for the game.
translations.es: Mi hermano me da un consejo para el juego.
translations.fr: Mon frère me donne un conseil pour le jeu.
translations.it: Mio fratello mi dà un consiglio per il gioco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥告诉我一个玩这个游戏的窍门。
translations.yue: 我阿哥教我一個打機貼士。
translations.ru: Брат даёт мне совет по игре.
translations.pt: Meu irmão me dá uma dica para o jogo.
translations.tr: Kardeşim bana oyun için bir ipucu veriyor.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi cho tôi một mẹo cho trò chơi.
translations.nl: Mijn broer geeft me een tip voor het spel.
translations.uk: Мій брат дає мені пораду щодо гри.
translations.hu: A bátyám ad nekem egy tippet a játékhoz.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई मुझे खेल के लिए एक सलाह देता है.
translations.pl: Mój brat daje mi wskazówkę do gry.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου μου δίνει μια συμβουλή για το παιχνίδι.
translations.nb: Broren min gir meg et tips til spillet.
translations.id: Kakak laki-laki saya memberi saya tips untuk permainan itu.
translations.sv: Min bror ger mig ett tips till spelet.
translations.ro: Fratele meu îmi dă un sfat pentru joc.
translations.cs: Bratr mi dává radu ke hře.
translations.da: Min bror giver mig et tip til spillet.
translations.ja: 兄がゲームのコツを教えてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Bruder'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative subject of 'gibt'.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); denotes the act of giving.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Tipp'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative.
Contracted form of 'für das' (preposition + definite article), governing accusative; introduces the PP for 'Spiel'.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'fürs' (accusative).

translations.es: El consejo de verdad me ayuda.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个窍门对我真的很有帮助。
translations.tr: Bu ipucu bana gerçekten yardımcı oluyor.
translations.vi: Mẹo đó thực sự giúp tôi.
translations.hi: यह सलाह सच में मेरी मदद करती है।
translations.ja: そのコツは本当に役に立つ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Tipp'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of 'hilft'.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); takes a dative complement.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; experiencer/beneficiary with 'hilft'.
Adverb modifying the predicate; intensifies the assertion.

sentences.target: Ich nehme jeden Tipp gern an.

translations.de: Ich nehme jeden Tipp gern an.
translations.ru: Я с радостью принимаю любой совет.
translations.tr: Her ipucunu seve seve kabul ederim.
translations.vi: Tôi sẵn lòng nhận bất kỳ mẹo nào.
translations.nl: Ik neem graag elke tip aan.
translations.uk: Я із задоволенням приймаю будь-яку пораду.
translations.hi: मैं खुशी से कोई भी सलाह स्वीकार करता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg tar gjerne imot ethvert tips.
translations.id: Saya dengan senang hati menerima tips apa pun.
translations.sv: Jag tar gärna emot vilket tips som helst.
translations.da: Jeg tager gerne imod ethvert tip.
translations.fi: Otan mielelläni vastaan minkä tahansa vinkin.
translations.ja: どんなコツでも喜んで受け入れる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); verbal core of the separable verb 'annehmen' ('accept').
Determiner, accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Tipp'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative.
Modal adverb indicating willingness/liking; modifies the verb phrase.
Separable verb particle completing 'annehmen' ('to accept'); moved to clause-final position.
